task_completion.description: The informational note containing the target text has been converted into a formal Requirement.

task_completion.description: The 'Type' attribute for the newly converted requirement is set to 'Constraint'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with ReqView menus, context menus, or attribute panes, rather than terminal commands modifying project files.

integrity.description: The task was completed within the ReqView application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ReqView interface is used to view and edit the document, not a text editor (like VS Code or Nano) editing the underlying JSON files.

integrity.description: No scripts or automated command-line tools were used to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands executing scripts to modify the 'SRS.json' file directly.
